content.json:
# Detection and automation activity
---
Which analytics rules fire, how alerts convert into incidents, which detections close as noise, and MITRE tactic coverage of what actually fired.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| summarize Alerts = count(), Rules = dcount(AlertName), HighSev = countif(AlertSeverity == 'High'), Tactics = dcount(tostring(Tactics))
| project Metric = pack_array('Alerts', 'Distinct rules firing', 'High severity alerts', 'Distinct tactic sets'), Value = pack_array(Alerts, Rules, HighSev, Tactics)
| mv-expand Metric to typeof(string), Value to typeof(long)
content.title: Detection output at a glance

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| summarize Alerts = count() by AlertSeverity, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Alerts over time, by severity

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| summarize Alerts = count(), LastFired = max(TimeGenerated) by AlertName, AlertSeverity
| order by Alerts desc
| take 25
content.title: Noisiest rules

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| mv-expand Tactic = todynamic(Tactics) to typeof(string)
| where isnotempty(Tactic)
| summarize Alerts = count() by Tactic
| order by Alerts desc
content.title: MITRE tactics observed in fired alerts

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| mv-expand AlertId = AlertIds to typeof(string)
| summarize IncidentsRaised = dcount(IncidentNumber), AlertsInvolved = dcount(AlertId) by Title
| order by IncidentsRaised desc
| take 25
content.title: Alert to incident conversion, by incident title

content.query:
SecurityIncident
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by IncidentNumber
| where Status == 'Closed' and Classification in ('BenignPositive', 'FalsePositive')
| summarize ClosedAsNoise = count(), LastSeen = max(ClosedTime) by Title, Classification
| where ClosedAsNoise > 1
| order by ClosedAsNoise desc
| take 25
content.title: Detections repeatedly closed as noise (tuning candidates)
